sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89080" key="prose/negcis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσένεγξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πρόσοδος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">income</tr_>, Thom.Mag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:p.306" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.306</biblScope> </bibl> R.</sense> </entryFree>
